meta.title: Nigeria Mathematics Foundation (WAEC/JAMB-aligned topics)
meta.source: Curated pack from public WAEC/JAMB mathematics topic lists. Extend via new pack versions — not hard-coded in app logic.

concepts.title: Numbers and basic operations
concepts.microLesson: Whole numbers, fractions, decimals, and the four operations. Order of operations (BODMAS) keeps answers consistent.

concepts.title: Ratios and percentages
concepts.microLesson: A ratio compares quantities. A percentage is a ratio out of 100. Market discounts and exam scores both use %.

concepts.title: Simple algebra and equations
concepts.microLesson: Letters stand for unknown numbers. Solving an equation means finding the value that makes both sides equal — balance both sides.

concepts.title: Geometry basics (angles & shapes)
concepts.microLesson: Angles around a point sum to 360°. Triangle angles sum to 180°. Know perimeter and area formulas for common shapes.

concepts.title: Word problems → equations
concepts.microLesson: Translate story to math: define the unknown, write relation, solve, check units. Same skill as market bargaining logic.
